# ROLL THE CODE

### Your Innovation Lab Deserves a Faster Engine.

---

## The Reality Inside Innovation Hubs

Your team identifies high-potential ideas — but turning them into working software takes 4-6 months and six-figure budgets. By the time the PoC is built, the window has moved, the board has lost patience, and the initiative gets shelved. **The bottleneck isn't imagination. It's delivery speed.**

---

## What We Do

We build custom software products in **days, not months** — using an enterprise-grade AI orchestration system designed by senior software architects.

- **PoC in days, not quarters** — validate ideas with working software before the next board cycle, starting from €10K
- **Full MVP delivery in weeks** — go from validated concept to production-ready product at a fraction of traditional cost (€50K-€200K)
- **Tech-stack & deployment agnostic** — we match your enterprise architecture, not the other way around
- **Legacy modernisation on demand** — reverse-engineer existing systems into modern, AI-ready architectures without starting from scratch

---

## What Innovation Teams Achieve With Us

| Scenario | Outcome |
|---|---|
| A corporate innovation lab needed to validate 3 product concepts before Q4 budget review | **All 3 PoCs delivered in 11 working days** — two advanced to full build |
| A mid-market company had a stalled digital product (8 months in, 40% complete) | **Rebuilt and deployed in 4 weeks** using AI-orchestrated development |
| An enterprise R&D team needed a working prototype to secure internal Series A funding | **Functional prototype delivered in 6 days** — funding approved |

*Typical clients see 5-10x acceleration vs. traditional software delivery.*

---

## How We Work Together

| Step | What Happens | Timeline |
|---|---|---|
| **1. Scoping Call** | We map your idea to a delivery plan with fixed scope and price | 1 call (45 min) |
| **2. Build** | Our AI orchestration system builds, supervised by senior architects | Days to weeks |
| **3. Deliver** | Working software, deployed to your environment, with handover | Milestone-based |

**Fixed-scope. Fixed-price. No surprises.**

---

## Why Roll the Code

We are not a no-code platform. We are not a traditional dev shop. We are **senior software architects who have built an AI system that does the coding** — combining decades of enterprise delivery experience with a proprietary orchestration layer that delivers deterministic, production-grade results.

**The founding team** brings backgrounds in enterprise software architecture, AI workflow automation, UX design, and quality assurance — backed by advisers in enterprise IT and branding.

Our partner **SignCoders** adds implementation capacity through mixed Deaf-hearing tech teams — a genuine diversity story with real engineering depth.

---

## Start Here

**Book a free 45-minute scoping session.** We'll map one of your ideas to a concrete delivery plan — with timeline and fixed price — so you can see exactly what's possible.

# ROLL THE CODE

### 3-Day Invoices? Your Competitors Are Doing It in 3 Minutes.

---

## The Problem You Already Know

Manual invoice processing in logistics is a bottleneck hiding in plain sight. Your operations team is spending **3 days per invoice cycle** — keying in data from PDFs, cross-referencing POs, chasing approvals over email, and fixing entry errors that cascade into payment disputes. Meanwhile, carriers are waiting, cash flow is locked, and your Head of Ops is firefighting instead of optimising routes and margins.

**The cost isn't just time — it's late-payment penalties, supplier friction, and senior people stuck on admin.**

---

## What We Build For Logistics Companies

We deliver **custom automation systems in days, not months** — using an enterprise-grade AI orchestration platform built by senior software architects.

- **Automated invoice capture & matching** — extract data from any format (PDF, email, EDI), match against POs and delivery notes, flag exceptions only
- **Approval workflows that move** — route invoices for sign-off based on value, supplier, or department — no more email chains
- **Live dashboard for Ops** — real-time visibility into invoice status, bottlenecks, and ageing — accessible from any device
- **Plugs into what you have** — integrates with your existing TMS, ERP, and accounting system (SAP, Xero, Sage, NetSuite, or custom)

---

## What Logistics Operations Teams Achieve

| Before | After |
|---|---|
| 3-day average invoice processing time | **Under 4 hours** — same-day processing becomes the norm |
| 12% of invoices contain manual entry errors | **Error rate drops below 1%** with automated data extraction |
| Finance team spends 60%+ of time on invoice admin | **80% of that time freed up** for exception handling and analysis |
| Supplier payment disputes every month | **Disputes reduced by 70%** — data matches at source |

*Typical clients see ROI within the first 8 weeks of deployment.*

---

## How We Work Together

| Step | What Happens | Timeline |
|---|---|---|
| **1. Workflow Audit** | We map your current invoice flow, identify quick wins and integration points | 1 session (45 min) |
| **2. Build** | Our AI orchestration system builds your custom solution, supervised by senior architects | 1–3 weeks |
| **3. Deploy & Handover** | Live system in your environment, team trained, support in place | Milestone-based |

**Fixed-scope. Fixed-price. No open-ended retainers.**

Starting from **EUR 10,000** for a focused automation build.

---

## Why Roll the Code

We are **senior software architects who have built an AI system that does the coding** — decades of enterprise delivery experience fused with a proprietary orchestration layer that produces deterministic, production-grade results. Not a no-code tool. Not a consultancy that bills by the hour.

Our partner **SignCoders** provides implementation capacity through mixed Deaf-hearing tech teams — genuine diversity with real engineering depth.

We have delivered automation solutions for operations teams across logistics, finance, and professional services — with live systems running in under 6 weeks.

---

## One Call. One Clear Answer.

**Book a free 45-minute workflow audit.** We'll map your invoice process, identify exactly where the 3 days are going, and give you a fixed-price delivery plan on the spot.
